class.name: my_franka_controllers/CartesianVelocityController
class.description: Cartesian Velocity Controller using Pinocchio and Eigen.

class.name: my_franka_controllers/HqpCartesianVelocityController
class.description: Hierarchical QP Cartesian Velocity Controller using Gurobi and FrankaKinematics.

class.name: my_franka_controllers/JointPdVelocityController
class.description: Low-level Joint PD Feedforward Controller with ZOH capabilities.
